description: Portable gamma exposure device side cutaway: housing with carry handle, lock indicator, rear drive-cable port (knurled collar, low) and front guide-tube port (flanged, high), guide tube arcing right to a collimator on a pipe-weld section with film cassette behind. Reveals: DU shield block fades in, S-tube centerline draws through it, bore walls + parked source capsule + pigtail fade, straight-ray stubs absorbed in the DU mass, then crank-out: drive cable enters the rear port, dashed travel path runs the S-tube and guide tube, park position empties, source seats in the collimator with a narrow cone onto the weld (EXPOSED), seat ping.
